prompt: Generate a detailed 3D render of a modern commercial airplane, using the reference image for the side profile view and clean livery style. Computer graphics render.
prompt_refined: Generate a detailed 3D computer graphics render of a modern commercial airplane, specifically an Airbus A350, in a direct side profile view precisely matching image 1. Replicate the clean livery style from image 1, featuring a white fuselage, dark blue tail, and the Lufthansa crane logo. The render should be against a pure white background.
